name: Baby Remote Display
description: Computes last feed / last pump + pump-due reminder and publishes them (retained) to the baby-remote OLED over MQTT. Runs every minute so the 'X ago' text and the reminder stay fresh. Device just renders baby/remote/display {l1,l2,l3} + flashes its LED on baby/remote/alert.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT logged_at FROM baby_events WHERE event_type='feed' ORDER BY logged_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_feed,
  (SELECT logged_at FROM baby_events WHERE event_type='pump' ORDER BY logged_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_pump,
  (SELECT event_subtype FROM baby_events WHERE event_type='pump' ORDER BY logged_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_pump_side;
